title: Beta Patch Notes - v0.109.0
author: demileaf
contents:
Another beta patch is here, Slayers! This one brings a host of balance changes, bug fixes, and new Epoch art. We've also begun to translate the game into Traditional Chinese (no timeline just yet on official support for other languages, but we'll let people know when we are looking for additional translators.) Perhaps most notably, two new Neow relics have been introduced, one of which grants a powerful, exclusive potion and the other a brand new quest card (with some cute beta art!)

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44971832/807ba5b49a1a995682549a6c412c0ad4b7bed7b5.png[/img]

[h3]CONTENT & BALANCE:[/h3]

[b]Ancients:[/b]
[list]
[*]Added new [b]Neow[/b] relic, [b]Dowsing Rod[/b] - "Upon pickup, add 1 Dowsing to your Deck."
[list]
[*][b]Dowsing[/b] - Quest - 0 cost - "After entering 5 more ? rooms, transform this into [b]Abundance[/b]."
[*][b]Abundance[/b] - Ancient - Skill - Cost 1 - "Choose 1 of 3 (Upgraded) Powers to add into your Hand. It is free to play this turn. Exhaust."
[/list]
[*]Added new [b]Neow[/b] relic, [b]Neow's Sacrifice[/b] - "Upon pickup, procure 1 [b]Ambergris[/b] and add 1 [b]Guilty[/b] to your Deck."
[list]
[*][b]Ambergris[/b] potion - "Heal for 50% of your max HP. Take an extra turn after this one."
[/list]
[*]Reworked [b]Nonupeipe's Diamond Diadem[/b] relic: "Whenever you play 2 or fewer cards in a turn, take half damage from enemies." -> "Start combat with 20 Block. Block is not removed at the start of your next turn."
[*]Moved [b]Orobos' Sand Castle[/b] relic moved from Pool 1 -> Pool 2 (second option instead of first option)
[*]Changed up [b]Darv[/b] blessing pools for more variety (will see Energy relics more often)
[*]Nerfed [b]Tanx's Meat Cleaver[/b] relic: HP gain decreased from 9 -> 5
[*]Buffed [b]Tezcatara's Toybox[/b] relic: relics gained increased from 4 -> 5
[*]Buffed [b]Vakuu's Fiddle[/b] relic: card draw increased from 2 -> 3
[*]Changed [b]Vakuu's Sere Talon[/b] and [b]Distinguished Cape[/b] relics: swapped downsides
[/list]
[b]Enemies:[/b]
[list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Aeonglass[/b]: Ebb move damage decreased from 26(32) -> 22(26) to lower its front-loaded damage
[*]Buffed [b]Torchhead Amalgam[/b]: now starts with a new Strong Tackle move on turn 1 to increase front-loaded damage from 18(22) -> 26(32)
[/list]
[b]Events:[/b]
[list]
[*]Nerfed [b]History Course[/b] relic: now only repeats Attacks, does not affect Skills
[/list]
[b]Ironclad:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Demon Form[/b] card:  Strength gain increased from 2(3) -> 3(4)
[*]Buffed [b]Expect a Fight[/b] card: no longer says "You cannot gain additional [E] this turn."
[*]Buffed [b]Primal Force[/b] card: [b]Giant Rock[/b] token damage increased from 16(20) -> 20(24)
[*]Changed [b]Taunt[/b] card:
[list]
[*]Block gain decreased from 7(8) -> 6(8)
[*]Rarity decreased from Uncommon -> Common
[/list]
[*]Changed [b]Bloodletting[/b] card: rarity increased from Common -> Uncommon
[*]Changed [b]Cruelty[/b] card: rarity decreased from Rare -> Uncommon
[*]Changed [b]Dominate[/b] card: rarity increased from Uncommon -> Rare
[/list]
[b]Silent:[/b]
[list]
[*]Reworked [b]Mirage[/b] card: Uncommon - Skill - 1(0) - "Gain Block equal to Poison on ALL enemies. Exhaust." -> Uncommon - Skill - 0 - "Next turn, gain 1(2) Energy."
[*]Reworked [b]Well-Laid Plans[/b] card:
[list]
[*]Uncommon - Power - Cost 1 - "At the end of your turn, Retain up to 1(2) card(s)." -> Rare - Power - Cost 1(0) - "At the end of your turn, you no longer discard your Hand."
[*]Now also available in multiplayer, was previously singleplayer-only
[/list]
[*]Reworked [b]Expertise[/b] card: "Draw cards until you have 6(7) in your hand." -> "Draw 2(3) cards. They gain Retain this turn."
[*]Buffed: [b]Outbreak[/b] card: damage increased from 3(4) -> 4(5)
[*]Changed [b]Accelerant[/b] card: rarity decreased from Rare -> Uncommon
[/list]
[b]Regent:[/b]
[list]
[*]Reworked [b]Pillar of Creation[/b] card: "Whenever you create a card, gain 3 Block." -> "The first time you create a card each turn, gain 5(7) Block."
[*]Nerfed [b]Collision Course[/b] card: damage decreased from 11(15) -> 10(14)
[/list]
[b]Necrobinder:[/b]
[list]
[*]Reworked [b]Eidolon[/b] card: "Exhaust your Hand. If 9 cards were Exhausted this way, gain 1 Intangible." -> "Play ALL Ethereal cards in your Exhaust Pile. Exhaust."
[/list]
[b]Defect:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Hyperbeam[/b] card: damage increased from 28(36) -> 30(38)
[*]Buffed [b]Sunder[/b] card: damage increased from 24(32) -> 26(34)
[*]Changed [b]Trash to Treasure[/b] card: upgrade changed from gains Innate -> lowers cost by 1
[/list]
[b]Multiplayer:[/b]
[list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Midnight[/b] card: damage decreased from 99(120) -> 60(72)
[*]Nerfed [b]The Ball[/b] card: scaling decreased from +15(25) -> +10(15)
[*]Nerfed [b]Blade Symphony[/b] card:
[list]
[*]Cost increased from 1 -> 2(1)
[*]Upgrade no longer increases Shiv count
[/list][/list]
[h3]USER EXPERIENCE & INTERFACE:**[/h3]

[b]General:[/b]
[list]
[*]Seeds are now 12 characters long and internal seed is larger
[*]Removed faint white outline from game cursor
[/list]
[b]Multiplayer:[/b]
[list]
[*]You can now play nearly any potion on another player
[*]Map ink circles are now the same for all players
[/list]
[h3]ART:[/h3]

[b]General:[/b]
[list]
[*]Added Epoch art for:
[list]
[*]Annihilation
[*]To Kill
[*]Futility
[/list][/list]
[b]Ancients:[/b]
[list]
[*]Added assets for [b]Dowsing Rod[/b] and [b]Neow's Sacrifice[/b] relics
[*]Added asset for [b]Ambergris[/b] potion
[*]Added beta portrait art for [b]Dowsing[/b] and [b]Abundance[/b] cards
[/list]
[b]Enemies:[/b]
[list]
[*]Swapped [b]Aeonglass[/b] double and heavy attack animations and improved the double attack VFX
[/list]
[b]Multiplayer:[/b]
[list]
[*]Added portrait art for the following cards:
[list]
[*][b]The Ball[/b]
[*][b]Plot[/b]
[/list]
[*]Created "Failed to join" text VFX
[/list]
[h3]WRITING:[/h3]

[b]Localization:[/b]
[list]
[*]Added Traditional Chinese (zht) as a selectable language with English fallback
[*]Added Traditional Chinese fonts (Source Han Serif TC, Noto Sans Mono CJK TC)
[*]Updated translations for various languages
[*]Fixed translation errors for French, Italian, Russian, and Thai
[*]Removed stale translations for redesigned [b]Well-Laid Plans, Fuel, Outbreak, Sere Talon, Cacophony[/b]
[/list]
[h3]BUG FIXES:[/h3]

[b]General:[/b]
[list]
[*]VSync setting in Graphics options now shows the correct On/Off state after restarting
[*]"Power wears off" notification no longer blocks mouse input
[*]Placeholder Orb numbers no longer briefly show up at the start of combat
[*]Correctly snapped scrolling menus at low FPS
[/list]
[b]Ancients:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed [b]Tanx's Whistle[/b] card preview and tooltip snapping to the top-left corner when hovered
[/list]
[b]Enemies:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed awkward delay when Osty and [b]Kaiser Krab[/b] would spawn at start of combat
[*]Fixed [b]Fabricator[/b] animations that weren't playing right
[*]Fixed [b]Fat Gremlin[/b] sometimes spawning without a bag of money when it should
[/list]
[b]Silent:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Expose[/b] card now properly triggers [b]Hand Drill[/b] relic
[/list]
[b]Necrobinder:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Soulbound[/b] card now shuffles souls into Draw Pile instead of putting them on the bottom
[/list]
[b]Multiplayer:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]One for All[/b] card no longer previews damage up on X-cost cards
[*]Fixed [b]Unmovable[/b] card causing other players to receive double Block from [b]Demonic Shield[/b] card when it was not the first Block card played
[*][b]Imitation Learning[/b] card now clones cards before they are played instead of after, allowing enchantments like Swift to apply to the cloning player
[*][b]Underworld[/b] card no longer causes Doom to be applied to players when enemies deal attack damage
[*]Fixed an issue where, if a player played [b]The Ball[/b] card while another played had [b]History Course[/b] relic, History Course could incorrectly end up playing a copy of The Ball next turn
[*]Fixed divergence that would sometimes occur when ending combat with [b]The Ball[/b] card
[*][b]Hibernate[/b] card no longer gives block to dead players
[*][b]Hibernate[/b] card now correctly displays stacks in its power icon
[*]If [b]Huddle Up[/b] triggers a choice for another player, the playing player is no longer blocked from playing cards
[*][b]The Ball[/b] now triggers the playing player's relics, not the receiving player's
[*]Fixed card effects breaking when a player dies while their own card is still resolving (e.g. to Thorns)
[*]Fixed divergence that would occur if one player took a long time to enter combat
[*]Player icons are rendered above the ink circle on the map
[*]Resolved issue where, if Epochs were deprecated, that player could no longer join multiplayer games
[/list]
[h3]MODDING:[/h3]
[list]
[*]Merged SavedPropertySerializationCache into ModelIdSerializationCache. SavedProperties are now included in its hash.
[*]Models from non-gameplay-affecting mods are now properly excluded in the hash
[/list]
